ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount of the order */,
  "purchase_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was purchased */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the order was purchased */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the order was placed */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the order was placed */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the order was placed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered, cancelled) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions from the customer */,
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative handling the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_representative_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., regular, VIP) */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_products" (
  "order_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order-product combination */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the product */,
  "product_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_products_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory the sales representative covers */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales representative */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sales representative (e.g., sales, support, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_representative_id")
)
